message:
🐛 Fix ACP history replay flooding and remove PTY fallback (#27)

- Add streaming gate to ACP manager: only emit chunks after prompt() is called,
  skipping history replay events from loadSession()
- Remove PTY spawn fallback from WebSocket input handler; broadcast error instead
- Simplify ChatView.handleSend to always use WebSocket (ACP path)

Tested: exited sessions respond correctly (no history flood), streaming works end-to-end

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
